items.name: Bronze Blade
items.lore: A sturdy starter sword that raises a hero's direct damage output.

items.name: Sunforged Spear
items.lore: A balanced spear favored by aggressive frontliners.

items.name: Wardsteel Cuirass
items.lore: Layered plate that improves survivability without altering tempo.

items.name: Trailcloak
items.lore: A light mantle that trades raw durability for faster rotations.

items.name: Ember Charm
items.lore: A glowing charm that adds a small all-purpose boost.

items.name: Tideband Ring
items.lore: A polished ring that smooths out offense, defense, and tempo.
